targets.release_boundary: raw/history stats resources and descriptor tables are owned by RTReflectionSignalState; frame-contract metrics remain stable across the public RT showcase path
targets.future_extension: If RT reflection capture/readback grows again, move the execution helper behind the same stats boundary instead of adding loose Renderer members

targets.release_boundary: manifest policy is owned by EnvironmentManifest and runtime environment reporting is owned by RendererEnvironmentState; public startup uses committed assets or procedural fallback
targets.future_extension: If environment streaming/residency becomes more complex, extract orchestration from Renderer_Environment without duplicating the manifest loader

targets.release_boundary: bloom controls, persistent pyramid resources, descriptor tables, temporal-screen resources, and cinematic post controls are held in named state structs and validated through ownership, graphics presets, and effects showcase frame-contract reporting
targets.future_extension: Keep new post effects inside these state files first; extract orchestration helpers only when a concrete new pass requires it

targets.release_boundary: SSAO and SSR controls, persistent render targets, descriptor tables, and per-frame flags are held in nested pass-owned state bundles and validated by ownership, screen-space UI/runtime smokes, and RT/temporal showcase paths
targets.future_extension: Keep additional screen-space effects in explicit controls/resources/descriptors/frame bundles before adding renderer orchestration

targets.release_boundary: HZB persistent texture state, descriptor tables, debug controls, and capture metadata are split into nested pass-owned bundles and validated by ownership plus temporal/RT runtime paths that consume HZB
targets.future_extension: Keep future HZB culling/debug expansion inside the resources/descriptors/debug/capture bundles before adding renderer orchestration

targets.release_boundary: Shadow map persistent resources, raster viewport/scissor state, and shadow tuning controls are split into nested pass-owned bundles and validated by ownership plus runtime paths that render and consume shadows
targets.future_extension: Keep future shadow map and cascade resource expansion inside resources/raster/controls or the existing cascade/local shadow state before adding renderer orchestration

targets.release_boundary: Depth buffer resource state and DSV/SRV descriptors are split into pass-owned nested bundles and validated by ownership plus temporal/RT runtime paths that sample and write depth
targets.future_extension: Keep future depth pyramid, read-only DSV, and depth sampling expansion inside resources/descriptors or an explicitly named depth pass state before adding renderer orchestration

targets.release_boundary: HDR and normal/roughness G-buffer render-target resources, descriptors, and resource states are split into nested pass-owned bundles and validated by ownership plus runtime paths that write, sample, and present them
targets.future_extension: Keep future color/deferred targets inside explicit resources/descriptors bundles before adding renderer orchestration

targets.release_boundary: ECS CPU-simulated particles with DX12-instanced billboard rendering are the public Phase 3 path, with controls/resources/frame stats split into pass-owned bundles. ParticleRenderResources owns instance/quad buffer allocation, upload, and vertex-buffer view creation; renderer ownership tests reject moving that GPU resource work back into Renderer_Particles.cpp. Backend-stage frame-contract stats and effects showcase validation keep GPUParticleSystem non-public until GPU simulation/sort/render are runtime-validated
targets.future_extension: Keep GPU particle migration explicit and separate from the public billboard contract until it has equivalent budget and visual validation
